column1: Contoso Finance Audit Readiness Checklist (Demo Only)
All content is fictional for training/demo purposes.

column3: Control / Task Description
Monthly close financial statements reconciled and reviewed
Quarterly financial statements drafted & CFO sign-off
Reconcile intercompany transactions
Review revenue recognition compliance (ASC 606 alignment)
Variance analysis (actual vs budget) completed monthly
Significant accounting policy changes reviewed and approved
Perform SOX Section 404 control self-assessment
column10: Half of controls tested as of last review

column3: Update and review risk control matrix (RCM)
User access reviews for finance systems (segregation of duties)
Investigate any unusual journal entries flagged
Monitor expense approvals for compliance with thresholds
Review delegation of authority (DOA) changes
Confirm compliance with key financial regulations (SOX, etc.)
Conduct internal walkthrough of financial controls
Review and update finance compliance policies
Confirm alignment with new regulatory updates (if any)
Simulate a compliance incident response drill
Backup financial systems and confirm data integrity
Verify financial system security patches applied
Test financial system access permissions
Verify financial data encryption at rest is enabled
Test disaster recovery for financial systems
Archive prior year financial records (per retention policy)
Verify all audit evidence from last audit is retained
Prepare PBC (Provided-By-Client) list for upcoming audit
Ensure mandated record retention periods adhered
Provide updated financial documentation per auditor requests
